findings.evidence: `JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:83` already proves the real self term with no `hω`; `JHolomorphicLine.lean:198` has `symplecticForm_apply_stdComplexLineReal_stdComplexLineImag_nonneg (hω : ω.Tames J)`, while `AlmostComplex.lean:343` shows `Compatible` is strictly `Invariant ∧ Tames`.
findings.fix: Remove `hω` from the equality lemmas, prove the imaginary self term directly from `F ∂t = J (F ∂s)`, `associatedBilinForm_apply`, `AlmostComplexStructure.apply_apply`, and `ω.neg_eq`; make nonnegativity take only `hω : ω.Tames J`.
findings.issue: `stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_two_mul_symplecticForm` assumes `hω : ω.Compatible J`, but the equality only uses complex-linearity and skew-symmetry/J²; compatibility wrongly excludes non-compatible tame pairs.

findings.evidence: `JHolomorphicLine.lean:248` and `:258` provide `fderivWithin_stdComplexLineImag` and `fderivWithin_stdComplexLine_apply`; this new file has only `namespace IsJHolomorphicAt` derivative lemmas at `JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:121-154`.
findings.fix: Add `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt` versions for `fderivWithin_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_eq_two_mul_symplecticForm` and nonnegativity, with `hs : UniqueDiffWithinAt ℝ s x`, derived from `hf.fderivWithin_isComplexLinear hs`.
findings.issue: The derivative API only covers `IsJHolomorphicAt`/`fderiv`, but the adjacent standard-line API also has the natural within-set form for domains such as strips and disks.

summary: The new API is over-specialized to compatible pairs and omits the within-set derivative form that the surrounding standard-line API already provides.
